evidence_snippets: BENCH. THE MOTHER EXITS, AND EVELDA DRUMGO, A VERY BEAUTIFUL AFRICAN AMERICAN WOMAN, HOLDING A NEWBORN, ENTERS. SHE LOOKS AROUND, GOES TO THE REGISTRAR, AND SIGNS IN.
Purports to be an x-ray of the hand of a ...white male...mmmm....mmmm...., after the removal of a vestigial sixth digit.
ANGLE ON STARLING, AS SHE WALKS BACK TOWARD HER FATHER'S GRAVE PAST A SMALL BLACK CLAD FAMILY, WHO ARE EMERGING FROM THE LIMO.
STARLING is explicitly described as a 'Hispanic' character in the script.
